TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kingbong_go, title = Kingbong_go, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kingbong_go} }

S.FORM: Kingbong go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 387.53 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 271.51 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.22 km²), 5,168 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,617 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,002 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Kingbong go ays psgayun 5 ru 27 alang. 27 alang hani ga, Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapulju , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai (新富社區Rukay部落), Rulakes .

Kingbong go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 387.53 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 271.51 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 87.22 km²), 5,168 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,617 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 5,002 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 97%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Rukay ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Kingbong go ays psgayun 5 ru 27 alang. 27 alang hani ga, Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapulju , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai (新富社區Rukay部落), Rulakes .
S.PHON: kiŋβoŋ ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na pajwan, rukaj ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kiŋβoŋ ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, *uki*e , tja*iljaul , s~ɕapulju , ɣa*u , pu*un , tju*jaas~ɕ , kinilukuljan , *jeluna*una*uk , *jumulj , tjuku*ulj , tjuku*ulj-*iri , tu*ri*uan , lalia*an , mananiɣaj , tjulitjulik , paumeli , *iljauljaul , kalata*raŋ , kaaluan , malji*el , *aljulu , ma*aljalu , tjulete*ete*ek , male*ep , tjuluuai , ŋu*ra-*rekai (****rukaj**), rulakes~ɕ .
